zh.lifeSummary: 當John Rymer於1500年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，他的父親William Rymer25歲，母親Eleanor London22歲。他與Mary Woodward結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1585年在英國享年85歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾。

nameMeanings.name: Rymer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Rimmer
meanings: English: occupational name for a poet, minstrel, or balladeer, principally from Anglo-Norman French rimour, rymour ‘poet’, but perhaps occasionally a derivative of Middle English rimen ‘to compose or recite verses’.
Possibly an altered form of German   Riemer  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When John Rymer was born in 1500, in London, Middlesex, England, his father, William Rymer, was 25 and his mother, Eleanor London, was 22. He married Mary Woodward. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1585, in England, at the age of 85, and was buried in Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Rymer est né en 1500, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, William Rymer, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Eleanor London, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Mary Woodward. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1585, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterré à Wiltshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: John Rymerが1500年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父William Rymerは25歳，母Eleanor Londonは22歳であった。Mary Woodwardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1585年にイギリスで85歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Rymer(이)가 1500년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Rymer(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor London(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Mary Woodward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1585년 영국에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Rymer nasceu em 1500, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Rymer, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor London, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Woodward. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Rymer родился в 1500 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William Rymer было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor London, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Woodward. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1585 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 85 лет и был похоронен в местности уилцхир, Англия.
